title: Large zinc tub for planting or for mini ponds
features: Are you looking for beautiful flower bowls for outdoor or mini pond decoration? Our beautiful zinc decoration is just the thing and so versatile
The galvanised bowl is particularly good as a garden pond and can be decorated with pond plants or a small fountain an absolute eye-catcher on the terrace.
The mini pond pool transforms your garden into a wonderful feel-good oasis. For example, use selected swimming decorations, stones, shells and solar pumps.
You can also plant our outdoor plant bowls with beautiful flowers and decorate your entrance area in front of the front door.
The zinc bowl is also a chic eye-catcher as a drink tub. With some ice, your drinks stay cool even in summer. Get the beautiful water bowl today and get creative!
description: Product Description Flower Huber - Galvanised Bowl for Planting Diameter 53 cm The galvanised bowl is particularly good as a garden pond and can be wonderfully decorated in the garden. Whether planted and decorated with water lilies as a mini pond pool, or depending on the season, the galvanised bowl offers many possibilities to decorate in style. The zinc tub is of course also suitable for indoors, whether in the living room, in the hallway or conservatory. No further assembly is required - simply set up and you're done! Garden decoration by Blümelhuber Weatherproof: Our products are made of durable metal, which is why they are weather and frost resistant. Whether spring, summer, autumn or winter - the garden decoration can stay outside all year round. Please note: Please keep babies, children and animals away from the bowl filled with water. Please always pay attention to a solid surface. To avoid limescale stains, distilled water can be used, but only artificial plants can be used. The water pool is not suitable for fish and other animals.
